title: Analog Devices Reports Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Record Fiscal 2023 Financial Results
text: WILMINGTON, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Analog Devices, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADI), a global semiconductor leader, today announced financial results for its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2023, which ended October 28, 2023. “For the fourth quarter, ADI delivered revenue and profitability above the midpoint of our outlook, despite the difficult macroeconomic environment. For the year, 2023 was our third consecutive year of record revenue, led by the strength of our Industrial and Automotive businesses,” sai.

title: Analog Devices: This Gem Is Worth Your Consideration
